[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_DLPT_001_POS",
    "title": "Verify downlink peak throughput measurement under excellent radio conditions with a stationary UE in single cell scenario",
    "description": "Measure and verify maximum achievable downlink throughput from application server to UE under excellent radio conditions in a single cell environment without inter-cell interference.",
    "preconditions": [
      "Single isolated cell activated, all other cells turned off",
      "UE (real or emulated) placed under excellent radio conditions (SINR as per clause 4.6)",
      "Application server connected close to core/core emulator with sufficient transport capacity"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G network management interface and activate the single serving cell for testing",
      "Place the UE at cell center close to the radiated gNB antenna ensuring SINR thresholds for excellent radio conditions are met",
      "Power on the UE and attach it to the network using `SSH admin@<IP>` for CLI access if needed",
      "Start downlink full-buffer UDP data transmission from the application server to the UE",
      "Verify stable utilization of highest downlink MCS, transport block size, and MIMO rank at the UE",
      "Capture and log radio parameters (RSRP, RSRQ, CQI, PDSCH SINR), PDSCH BLER, MCS, MIMO rank, and throughput metrics at UE and application server sides for at least 3 minutes",
      "Stop data transmission and power off or set UE to airplane mode to empty buffers"
    ],
    "expectedResult": [
      "Stable and maximum achievable downlink throughput observed at UE and application server",
      "Radio KPIs indicate excellent radio conditions with minimum BLER and highest MCS, transport block size and MIMO rank utilization",
      "Captured logs include median and standard deviation for all metrics",
      "Spectral efficiency calculated as per clause 4.8"
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "Restore UE to normal operating mode",
      "Turn on other cells if required"
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Compare throughput and radio KPI logs against expected thresholds for excellent radio conditions",
      "Validate stable throughput over 3+ minutes",
      "Check spectral efficiency calculations"
    ]
  },
